developer-ownership.name: Developer ownership
developer-ownership.description: Why developers should own their working environment — and how to build one that travels: containerized editors, remote development, and a homelab that actually earns its keep.

ai-assisted-development.name: AI-assisted development
ai-assisted-development.description: What coding agents need before they become useful — sandboxing them with Docker, weighing local models against hosted assistants, and designing a development environment that's safe to hand to an agent.

game-dev-systems.name: Game development systems
game-dev-systems.description: Building games systems-first: modular architecture in Godot, deterministic lockstep networking for RTS, and why the tools come before the content.
